chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-927 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7383/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.4059/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr. Mumtaz Ali Jehangir Lashari, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the material available on record. Upon perusal of page No.21, Annexure ‘B’, it appears that the petitioner is seeking the same relief which was earlier claimed in C.P. No.296 of 2012. The said petition was disposed of vide order dated 17.09.2014, wherein certain directions were issued. Under such circumstances, as no fresh ground has been made out for claiming the same relief which has already been adjudicated, therefore present petition is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
